home.title: Iván Ciudad Espinar - Software Developer & Telematics Engineer
home.description: Welcome to the website of Iván Ciudad Espinar, Software Developer & Telematics Engineer. Discover my projects, articles, hobbies and more about my life and career in software development.
home.welcome_subtitle: Welcome to my corner of the internet, where I code ideas and build digital experiences.
home.what_find_desc: This website is my personal portfolio and testing laboratory. A space where I demonstrate my skills as a Software Developer, apply SEO strategies, and share who I am beyond code.
home.my_projects_desc: Discover what I've built. Websites, applications, and experiments with the latest technologies.
home.career_desc: My professional path: companies, roles, and experience in telematics engineering and development.
home.about_me_desc: A short biography, my interests (video games, series, movies, etc.) and who I am behind the code.

projects.title: Iván Ciudad Espinar - Software Development Projects
projects.description: Explore the projects of Iván Ciudad Espinar, Software Developer & Telematics Engineer. Discover my work in software development, web applications, and more.
projects.buscaminas_desc: Modern version of the classic Minesweeper developed in TypeScript. A technical challenge that implements efficient recursive algorithms for cascading cell opening.
projects.pokemon_desc: Check weaknesses and strengths of Pokemon types with Drag & Drop and SSR using PokeAPI.
projects.eshop_desc: Next.js laboratory to explore SSR, ISR, SSG and Cache Components with a focus on SEO and accessibility.
